name: DataPulse Analytics Agent
description: DataPulse is a specialist data analysis agent that ingests structured datasets (CSV, JSON, Parquet), runs statistical summaries, detects anomalies, and generates human-readable insight reports. Designed for integration in multi-agent financial and operational pipelines where downstream agents require clean, enriched data.

bearerAuth.description: JWT token issued by DataPulse OAuth2 endpoint

skills.name: Statistical Summary
skills.description: Computes descriptive statistics (mean, median, std deviation, percentiles, skewness) for any numeric dataset. Returns a structured JSON report with per-column breakdowns and a plain-language narrative.
examples: Summarise the columns in this CSV
What are the key statistics for this dataset?
Run a statistical analysis on sales_data.json

skills.name: Anomaly Detection
skills.description: Identifies outliers and anomalies in time-series or tabular data using IQR and Z-score methods. Flags rows that deviate significantly from expected distributions and returns annotated results.
examples: Find anomalies in this transaction log
Detect unusual values in my sensor data

skills.name: Insight Report Generator
skills.description: Produces a structured Markdown report summarising dataset characteristics, key findings from statistical analysis, detected anomalies, and recommended next steps for downstream processing.
examples: Generate an insight report for this dataset
Create a summary report I can share with stakeholders
